PhotoBoothSession.title: PhotoBoothSession
PhotoBoothSession.description: Represents a single user's interaction session with the Free-Time Machine photo booth, from photo capture and AI transformation to sharing portal generation and status tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PhotoBoothSession entity.

creationTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the photo booth session was initiated.

originalPhotoStoragePath.description: The internal storage path or identifier for the user's original captured high-resolution photo in cloud storage.

themeName.description: The name of the chosen thematic filter.

aiGeneratedImageStoragePath.description: Internal storage path for the generated image.

qrCodeImageStoragePath.description: Storage path for QR code image.

imageData.description: Base64 encoded image data for the final Polaroid vision.

activity.description: The specific activity depicted in the vision.

theme.description: The theme category of the vision.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vision was created.

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns this vision.

definition.description: Stores detailed photo booth sessions, owned by the user. Used for internal tracking and history.
Stores shared AI visions. Documents are created with a random ID and are publicly readable for sharing, but write-protected by ownerId.

params.name: visionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the shared vision.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure includes a root 'visions' collection for shared access. The schema supports storing the final Polaroid image.
